name: World of Golf
about: World of Golf is a multi-faceted entertainment venue located in Florence, KY, featuring an executive golf course, driving ranges, mini-golf, and high-tech golf simulators. The facility offers a complete golf experience with a blend of outdoor play on its challenging executive course and indoor practice options. It caters to a diverse clientele including beginners, families, and serious golfers looking for a convenient golf experience. The venue provides food and beverage services through The Tin Cup and hosts various events, parties, and instructional programs, making it a versatile destination for both recreation and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient location off I-75 for easy access
Wide range of amenities from outdoor course to indoor simulators
Comprehensive food and beverage offerings with a full bar and grill
Variety of programs available for all skill levels and ages

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen food service available through The Tin Cup
Full bar service available at The Tin Cup

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals are also available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, but The Tin Cup offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As an executive course with shorter holes, 18 holes can typically be played in 2-3 hours, making it faster than a regulation course.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, World of Golf is kid-friendly, offering mini-golf, junior golf programs, and various youth instructional leagues for ages 4-15.
